expiry_date¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

get_next_by_expiry_date(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField: expiry_date>, is_next=True, **kwargs)¶
get_previous_by_expiry_date(*, field=<django.db.models.fields.DateTimeField: expiry_date>, is_next=False, **kwargs)¶
id¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

objects = <django.db.models.manager.Manager object>¶
token¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

used¶

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

user¶

Accessor to the related object on the forward side of a many-to-one or one-to-one (via ForwardOneToOneDescriptor subclass) relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Child.parent is a ForwardManyToOneDescriptor instance.

user_id¶

authenticator.tests module¶

authenticator.urls module¶

authenticator.views module¶

authenticator.views.build_email(user, reset_url)[source]¶

Builds email for password reset

authenticator.views.change_user_password(username, new_password)[source]¶

Handles user password re-creation

authenticator.views.generate_reset_url(user)[source]¶

Creates a secure generate reset url that expires in 5 minutes

authenticator.views.login_user(request)[source]¶

Handles user login

authenticator.views.logout_user(request)[source]¶

Logs the user out and redirects to login page

authenticator.views.register_user(request)[source]¶

Handles user registration

authenticator.views.reset_password(request)[source]¶

Handles the password reset form submission (when user enters new password)

authenticator.views.reset_user_password(request, token)[source]¶

Handles resetting user password when the user clicks the link in their email

authenticator.views.send_password_reset(request)[source]¶

Handles sending the password reset email after user submits their email

authenticator.views.welcome(request)[source]¶

Only logged-in users can see the welcome page
